name: Sylveon catboy AND Vaporeon catboy !!
description:
DOUBLE TROUBLE

Hi twins !!!!

This is a sequel to one my previous bots, which just included Sylveon.

Because I'm not writing in other pokemon, these two come from a lab that makes people into fictional demihumans. Do with that what you will!!

Have fun :)
